## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content, SEO, and outbound marketing progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing positive results: 65 articles published, 7 more scheduled; insurance-related content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [SEO improvements: Indexing issues being addressed; recommendations for canonical tags and schema markup](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Outbound marketing: Infrastructure diversified to enhance deliverability; document handling campaign planned](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [65 articles published, 7 more scheduled this week](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Focus on document handling across insurance, marketing, and sales](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Impressions and clicks increasing, though absolute click numbers still low due to indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Insurance-related articles showing promising performance, even within a week of publication](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [High CTRs observed for insurance topics (e.g., claims automation, compliance monitoring)](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### SEO and Indexing Improvements

  - [Indexing issues identified: non-human centric URLs slowing down the process](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Main blog page segmented for indexing, showing positive signs (3 articles indexed right after)](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Recommendations:](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
    1.  Add canonical tags to all pages (self-canonicals suggested)
    2.  Add schema markup to all blog articles
  - [Webflow implementation might be challenging; technical assistance offered if needed](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Upcoming Content

  - [25 articles scheduled for next week](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Continuing focus on document handling and data extraction](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Retesting AI-powered automation, agents, and software integrations](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [New construction document handling and process automation topics being explored](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Outbound Marketing Strategy

  - [Infrastructure diversification completed to enhance deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Live campaigns:](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
    1.  Document handling campaign planned
    2.  Expanding title focus campaigns
  - [Deliverability optimization:](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Open rates and click rates strong, low bounce rates](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Optimizing subject lines, copy, and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
      - [Suppression list to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [Number of platforms steadily increasing](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Link building efforts continuing positively](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)

  - [Kaitlin to follow up with Shalgo for use cases early next week](https://fathom.video/share/QNdDMBMur4_R3uUg7QPjxMW3J-39yTod?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
